description: Covert societies, criminal networks, and underground movements.
factions: Syndicate
A web of criminals and merchants bound by profit, enforcing loyalty through leverage and violence.
Cabal
A shadowy inner circle scheming behind closed doors and trusting no outsiders with their true agenda.
Coven
A tight circle of witches or warlocks sharing forbidden rites and guarding their secrets fiercely.
Cult
Fanatical worshippers serving a hidden master, surrendering their will for promises of transcendence.
Resistance
A decentralized network operating through coded messages and safe houses, striking tyrants from the shadows.
Rebellion
Open defiance blazing against the ruling order, rallying the desperate under a banner of liberation.
Revolution
Radicals aiming to tear down the old world entirely and rebuild it according to their vision.
Insurgency
Guerrilla fighters bleeding an occupying power through ambush and sabotage, vanishing before retaliation comes.
Underground
Operatives moving through hidden tunnels and safe houses, keeping an outlawed cause alive in secret.
Web
An invisible lattice of contacts and informants spanning cities, pulling strings no one can trace.
Ring
A closed loop of conspirators passing orders in whispers, each member knowing only the next link.
Cell
A self-contained unit acting independently, so that capture of one cannot betray the whole.
Gang
Street-level criminals carving out turf through intimidation and defending their corner with blades and bravado.
Secret Society
Hidden members infiltrating positions of power and advancing an agenda the outside world never sees.
Spy Network
Agents embedded across enemy territory, funneling stolen secrets back through dead drops and ciphered messages.
Rebels
Fighters waging guerrilla war against an occupier, striking from forest camps and city cellars alike.
Separatists
A breakaway faction demanding independence, risking civil war to carve a homeland from a larger state.
Racket
Enforcers extorting merchants for protection, growing fat on fear while crushing anyone who refuses to pay.
Dealers
Black-market arms flowing through their hands to every side of a conflict, fueling wars for coin.
Counterfeiters
Forgers producing flawless fake currency and documents, undermining trust in every seal and signature.
Con Artists
Silver-tongued swindlers running elaborate schemes and vanishing with the mark's fortune before the truth lands.
Grave Robbers
Tomb raiders cracking open crypts by moonlight and selling relics to the highest bidder.
Crime Ring
Kidnappers and enforcers snatching targets for ransom, leveraging terror to wring gold from desperate families.
Criminal Syndicate
A sprawling empire of vice coordinating smuggling, extortion, and murder across multiple cities.
Revolutionary Cell
A tiny cadre of ideologues plotting to topple the regime, ready to sacrifice everything for the cause.
Mob
A volatile crowd surging through the streets, tipping from angry protest into destructive frenzy.
Hive
Operatives swarming with eerie coordination, sharing intelligence so fast that no target stays hidden for long.
Intelligence Agency
State-backed spymasters running covert operations abroad, trading in secrets that topple governments and start wars.
